claim_statement: GR emerges as a macroscopic limit when tau approaches zero and updates appear continuous.
method: Take tau->0 and coarse-grain graph dynamics; verify GR-form recovery and conservation constraints.
pass_condition: Recovered equations match intended GR-form closure within defined approximation tolerance.
fail_condition: GR limit cannot be recovered or violates core consistency/conservation requirements.
commands: .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\run_qng_p3_symbolic_validation.py --test-id QNG-T-044 --claim-id QNG-C-093 --mode gr_limit --dataset-id DS-001 --derivation "03_math/derivations/qng-c-093.md" --formula-anchor "a_total = -nablaSigma - tau*(v.nabla)nablaSigma + O(tau^2)" --seed 3044 --out-dir "05_validation/evidence/artifacts/qng-t-044"

decision.note: GR-limit symbolic diagnostics pass tau->0 closure, conservation, and decay-stability gates.
